home.title: Au Fil des Saveurs
home.heroProse: Spéculoos baked slowly, shortbreads with fresh Belgian butter, macarons with hazelnuts from Piedmont. Everything is made in Liège, in small quantities, to preserve the taste.
home.featuredTitle: The biscuits we bake again and again
home.storyProse: Au Fil des Saveurs was born from an obsession: turning the Belgian biscuit into a tasting experience, not an industrial product. In our workshop on Rue de la Maison in Liège, every batch comes out golden by hand, watched to the minute.
home.coffretsProse: Choose your favourite biscuits and we'll assemble a box for you in recyclable beeswax packaging. Available spring 2026.
home.instagramEyebrow: LIFE AT AU FIL DES SAVEURS
home.newsletterDisclaimer: No spam, just monthly updates. Unsubscribe in 1 click.

notreHistoire.title: Our story
notreHistoire.description: Who is behind Au Fil des Saveurs, why this project, how we work. A sincere page about Belgian craftsmanship.
